author: Yohan Koo
description: Connect Eagle asset library to Obsidian. Search, embed, and upload images to cloud (ImgHippo, R2, S3, WebDAV). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: CMDS Eagle

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
Addresses the failed automated review check on 1.6.1.

- Properly implements editor-paste/editor-drop guards inline (removes the disallowed eslint-disable of obsidianmd/editor-drop-paste — the sole hard Error)
- Types Eagle API response, removes unused vars and unnecessary assertions
releases.name: 1.6.2 - Fix editor-drop/paste review check

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
Resolves Obsidian community plugin review issues for official registration.

- Corrected manifest (description, authorUrl, removed unreachable fundingUrl)
- Replaced innerHTML with safe DOM construction (security)
- Migrated inline styles to CSS classes
- settings headings via Setting().setHeading()
- window timers, activeDocument, explicit Buffer import, vault.configDir
- Fixed misused/floating promises
releases.name: 1.6.1 - Obsidian community review fixes

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.6.0

### Cross-Platform Sync Improvements
- **Sub-path support**: Handle sync folders not directly under `/Users/name/` (e.g., OneDrive, Dropbox subfolder)
- **Improved path detection**: Better regex matching for Windows paths
- **Cleaner architecture**: Removed experimental render-only mode for stability

### How to Use Sub-path
If your sync folder is at:
- Mac: `/Users/yohankoo/OneDrive/CMDS Sync/...`
- Windows: `C:/Users/johnf/OneDrive/Documents/CMDS Sync/...`

Set sub-path in settings:
- Mac: `OneDrive`
- Windows: `OneDrive/Documents`

### Other Changes
- Added GitHub link to settings footer
- Bug fixes for auto-conversion trigger

---
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/johnfkoo951/cmds-eagle/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0
releases.name: v1.6.0 - Cross-Platform Sync Improvements

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## What's New

### Cross-Platform Sync Improvements
- **Auto-convert paths on file open**: Automatically convert Mac/Windows paths when opening notes (new setting)
- **Improved paste handling**: No longer triggers Eagle path conversion when pasting already-formatted markdown images

### Bug Fixes
- Disabled DOM manipulation for path conversion (caused rendering issues)
- File-based conversion now works reliably

### Settings
- New toggle: "Auto-convert paths on file open" under Cross-Platform Sync section

### Full Changelog
https://github.com/johnfkoo951/cmds-eagle/compare/1.4.1...1.5.0
releases.name: v1.5.0 - Cross-Platform Auto-Convert

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.4.0

### Added
- **HEIC, HEIF, AVIF, TIFF** file format support across all features
- **Search filters** in modal - filter by scope (name/tags/notes/folders) and file type (images/videos/docs)
- **Library info display** - shows Eagle library name and total item count in search modal
- **README images** - added demo GIFs and screenshots

### Changed
- **Unlimited search results** - removed 500/1000 limit, now shows all items
- **Settings UI redesign** - button-style filters for search scope and file types
- **Search limit increased** from 500 to unlimited

### Fixed
- File format filtering now properly includes all supported image types
releases.name: v1.4.0

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## Fix
- Fixed [object Object] appearing in file paths
- Reverted to thumbnail path as primary path resolution method
- Library path used as fallback only
releases.name: v1.3.2

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## Fix
- **Path resolution fixed**: Now uses Eagle library path from API to construct absolute file paths
- Works correctly across different user environments (different library locations)

## How it works
- Gets library path from `/api/library/info` endpoint
- Constructs path: `{libraryPath}/images/{itemId}.info/{name}.{ext}`
- Falls back to thumbnail path method if needed
releases.name: v1.3.1

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add 'Include metadata card' setting in Search & Embed section
- Add debug logging for Eagle path resolution
- Add getLibraryPath() API method

## Settings
- **Include metadata card**: Toggle to add metadata (type, size, tags, Eagle link) below embedded images
releases.name: v1.3.0

releases.author: johnfkoo951
releases.description:
Initial release

## Features
- Eagle library search and embed
- Cloud upload (ImgHippo, R2, S3, WebDAV)
- Image paste/drop handling
- Batch convert local images to cloud URLs

## Installation
Use BRAT: `johnfkoo951/cmds-eagle`
releases.name: v1.2.0
